heroes.title: Building Intelligence To Power Scalable Innovation
heroes.subtitle: We help forward-thinking companies harness AI and modern engineering to build products that scale with confidence, speed, and measurable impact.

heroes.title: Building Intelligence To Power Scalable Innovation
heroes.subtitle: MetaTech integrates custom software engineering, advanced data and AI systems, and strategic staff augmentation to power scalable, high impact digital transformation.

intro.headline: Engineering business solutions through three strategic pillars
intro.body: AI powered delivery combining intelligent software engineering, data driven insight, and elite talent to accelerate scale, quality, and competitive advantage.

tabs.title: Data + AI Settings Innovation
tabs.subtitle: Our Data and AI services combine engineering, analytics, and applied AI to help organizations understand data, predict outcomes, and automate decisions. From trusted analytics to production grade AI systems, we deliver intelligence that works in the real world.

features.title: Data Integrity First
features.description: AI outputs are only as reliable as the data feeding them. We design, validate, and strengthen your data foundation from the ground up. Garbage in, garbage out is not a risk we take with your business.

features.title: Workflows Before Automation
features.description: Before we build anything, we map your business workflows end to end by surveying the ambiguity. We understand the decisions being made, the people making them, and the systems involved. That clarity determines how and where automation creates real leverage, not just activity.

features.title: Governance With Same Standard
features.description: We implement data governance frameworks that carry the same accountability as human oversight. Your agents operate within defined boundaries. Auditability, control, and compliance are built in, not added on.

tabs.title: Custom Software Engineering
tabs.subtitle: We design and build scalable software platforms tailored to your business — from modern web applications to cloud-native systems that evolve with your product roadmap.

features.title: Architecture That Scales
features.description: We design systems that grow with your product — modular, observable, and built for change. Every architectural decision balances speed today with resilience for what comes next.

features.title: Delivery With Discipline
features.description: Predictable delivery starts with clear scope, tight feedback loops, and engineering practices that keep teams aligned. We ship incrementally without sacrificing rigor.

features.title: Quality Built In
features.description: Testing, code review, and operational readiness are part of the build — not a phase at the end. Quality is how we protect velocity over the long run.

tabs.title: Elite Tech Staffing
tabs.subtitle: Augment your team with senior engineers, data specialists, and AI practitioners who integrate quickly and raise the bar on execution, collaboration, and outcomes.

features.title: Senior Talent Only
features.description: We place experienced engineers and specialists who can contribute from day one. No bench warmers — every engagement is staffed for impact, not headcount.

features.title: Embedded Collaboration
features.description: Our people integrate into your workflows, tools, and culture. They work as an extension of your team with the same accountability and communication standards.

features.title: Outcome-Focused Teams
features.description: Staffing succeeds when outcomes are clear. We align talent to measurable goals so augmentation drives delivery — not just capacity.

products.name: AmICredible
products.title: An AI-powered credibility checking platform
products.subtitle: that helps users verify claims, analyze sources, and make informed decisions with Quick Check, Deep Check, and Image Check features.

techStack.title: Built With Modern Technologies
techStack.subtitle: We use modern, reliable technologies to design, build, and scale high-performance software systems. Our team works with proven tools to deliver secure, scalable, production-ready solutions.
